threads.title: What's the most affordable satellite object detection API for a small startup?
threads.draft_response:
Great question on cost. Most enterprise satellite detection platforms (Maxar, Planet Labs) require $10k+/month contracts — way out of reach for smaller teams. There are a few more accessible options now.

One I've been building is Kestrel AI — YOLOv8-based satellite object detection at $99/month (200 searches) via the web app, with API access on the $399 plan. Sub-3s detection, 88.7% mAP on buildings/vehicles/aircraft/ships.

Happy to share more or answer specific technical questions if useful.

threads.title: How to detect buildings from satellite imagery using deep learning?
threads.draft_response:
For satellite object detection, there are a few tiers of tooling depending on your scale and budget.

For mid-market use cases (insurance, construction, real estate) — Kestrel AI does this with YOLOv8 at $99/month. Address → satellite image → detection results in under 3 seconds. Works well for building footprint and vehicle detection.

Happy to share more or answer specific technical questions if useful.
